'''[[Sardu Sallowe]]'s miniature [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]]''' was a sandcrawler that belonged to the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] Sardu Sallowe. It was a modified [[Tagge Company/Legends|TaggeCo]] ''Survey''-class crawler, and could hold up to 16 [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] assistants and 10 prisoners. It was 7 meters high and 40 meters long, and could hold up to 20 metric tons worth of cargo.
